PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('/scene/1','/scene/7','/scene/11','/js/vr/main.js','/js/vr/engine.js','/js/vr/scenes.js','/js/vr/builders.js','/js/user.js','/css/vr.css','/libs/three/three.module.js'\)\) { try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5210$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes\)" } catch { "$u -> ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
